CustomField.description: FTE posts - % of administrative, sales and customer service, or process, plant & machine operatives (SOC Codes 4, 71, 8)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Estimated percentage of administrative, sales and customer service, or process, plant and machine operatives directly involved in delivering Wave 3 project so far. For example: office managers, secretaries, machine drivers (SOC Codes 4, 71, 8)
CustomField.label: FTE Post - % Admin/Sales/Cust Serv/Ops
